WARNING: MacBook Air 13-inch M3 (X2819/MLB). NOT a Pro, NOT M4. All rails verified against Power Aliases pages 101-104.
description: All rails grouped by power state (sleep domain). G3H = always present with AC, AON = always on with battery, S2-S0 = progressively more awake.

domains.name: G3H
domains.description: Present whenever AC power is connected (pre-charger, pre-battery)

domains.name: AON
domains.description: Always on when battery or charger connected. Stays up in all sleep states.
domains.wake_condition: PPBUS_AON present (battery connected or charger active)

domains.name: S2
domains.description: System sleep / standby. Memory retention active. Most peripherals off.
domains.wake_condition: PMU enable signals from AON domain. P5VS2_PWR_EN, P3V3S2_PWR_EN asserted.

domains.name: S1
domains.description: Light sleep. Core SoC domains retained at low voltage.
domains.wake_condition: S2 domain active + SoC sleep state controller asserts S1 enables

domains.name: S0_AWAKE
domains.description: Fully awake. SoC running, display on, all dynamic domains active.
domains.wake_condition: PMU_ACTIVE_READY asserted. All S2/S1 rails stable.
